sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16492" key="a)steri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστερ-ίτης</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of a <sense id="n16492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mythical precious stone,</tr_> Ptol.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg029:p.153B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.153B.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.50B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.50B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
